## Summary

<!-- One line: what does this PR do? Conventional Commit style -->

## Type

- [ ] `feat` — new functionality
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, config, rules
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] Other: ___

## Roadmap phase

<!-- e.g. Phase 2 — Auth, Workspaces -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Single focused scope
- [ ] Conventional Commits
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (if code changed)
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes (if code changed)
- [ ] ADR updated in `docs/adr/` (if architecture changed)
- [ ] `docs/*.md` updated (if product/data model changed)
- [ ] `.cursor/rules/` updated (if stack or workflow changed)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env.local` committed
- [ ] Respects company-first + metadata-driven principles

## Notes

<!-- Optional: follow-ups, breaking changes -->
